title: 7 Natural Tinctures for Hypothyroidism in Women with a Family History of the Condition
description: Withania somnifera tinctures have been studied for their potential benefits in managing hypothyroidism. The main reason they may help is due to the presence of withanolides, which are a group of bioactive compounds found in the plant. Withanolides have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the thyroid gland. This, in turn, may support the thyroid's ability to produce thyroid hormones. If you're considering trying Withan...
